name: Campco
description_short: CAMPCO Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving Gillette, WY with comprehensive banking, lending, and investment services.
description_long:
CAMPCO Federal Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union based in Gillette, Wyoming, serving the local community and surrounding areas. As a credit union, it is member-owned rather than shareholder-owned, positioning itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks. The institution is regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration), providing federal insurance protection for member deposits.

Campco offers a diverse suite of financial services spanning deposit accounts, lending products, and digital banking solutions. On the deposit side, they provide high-yield checking and savings accounts, money market accounts (589 active accounts with $31.8M in assets), share certificates/CDs (569 active accounts), and retirement accounts including IRAs and KEOGH plans (202 active accounts). For borrowing, the credit union offers flexible auto loans, fixed-rate mortgages (both 15+ year and shorter terms), business loans, and personal loan applications through their online platform. Digital services include mobile banking, bill pay, online loan payments, and electronic signature authentication.

Campco differentiates itself through several member-centric features: competitive interest rates on savings products, streamlined mortgage processing with fast approvals, personalized business lending support, exclusive member benefits and discounts, and robust online/mobile banking capabilities. The institution emphasizes financial planning and wealth management services, positioning itself as a full-service financial partner rather than transactional banking. Their mortgage processing specifically highlights stress-free transactions and fast approvals, while business lending emphasizes personalized support for growth-focused entrepreneurs.

As a credit union serving a specific geographic area, Campco's primary strength lies in community banking with competitive rates and member-focused service. The main limitation is geographic constraint—services are centered in Gillette, WY and surrounding service areas, making it inaccessible to consumers outside their membership field. Additionally, like most community credit unions, they may have smaller product innovation compared to larger national institutions, and specific APR/rate information is not publicly displayed on their service pages. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Money market accounts (589 active accounts, $31.8M total)
IRA and KEOGH retirement accounts (202 active accounts)
Fixed-rate mortgages (15+ years and 15 years or less)
pros: NCUA-insured member deposits with federal protection
Competitive interest rates on savings accounts and money market accounts ($31.8M in active money market deposits)
Streamlined mortgage processing with fast approvals and stress-free transactions
Comprehensive loan products including auto loans, mortgages, and business financing
Robust digital banking with mobile app, bill pay, and online loan applications
Personalized business lending support with flexible financing options
Tax-advantaged retirement account options (IRA/KEOGH) with dedicated planning services
cons: Geographic limitation—services restricted to Gillette, WY and defined service areas; not available nationally
Specific interest rates and APR information not disclosed on public website, requiring direct inquiry
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
Smaller institution may lack product innovation and specialty services of larger national credit unions
Website content suggests services but lacks transparency on loan approval timelines or competitive rate comparisons
best_for: Gillette, WY residents seeking member-owned banking with competitive rates and personalized service
Small business owners in the service area needing flexible financing and dedicated business support
Community-minded savers prioritizing credit union values over national bank convenience
Mortgage borrowers in the region seeking streamlined approval processes and fixed-rate options
diagnosis: CAMPCO Federal Credit Union is best suited for Gillette, WY-area residents and business owners seeking community-focused banking with competitive rates, member benefits, and personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—membership and services are limited to their defined service area, making this institution unavailable for consumers outside Gillette, Wyoming and surrounding territories.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
